records.question: Which employees named George Chuter live in Bristol and are at least 23 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
WHERE employee.city = 'Bristol' AND employee.name = 'George Chuter' AND employee.age >= 23
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.Employee_ID
FROM employee
WHERE Name = 'George Chuter' AND City = 'Bristol' AND Age >= 23

records.question: Who are the employees from Bristol working part-time since 2011 at FC Lahti, managed by Ilkka Mäkelä, where the shop is located in Lahti in the Lahden Stadion district with exactly 15000 products?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
JOIN shop ON hiring.shop_id = shop.shop_id
WHERE shop.district = 'Lahden Stadion' AND shop.location = 'Lahti' AND shop.manager_name = 'Ilkka Mäkelä' AND hiring.start_from = '2011' AND hiring.is_full_time = 'F' AND employee.city = 'Bristol' AND shop.name = 'FC Lahti' AND shop.number_products = 15000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.Employee_ID
FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.Employee_ID = hiring.Employee_ID
JOIN shop ON hiring.Shop_ID = shop.Shop_ID
WHERE employee.City = 'Bristol'
  AND hiring.Is_full_time = 0
  AND hiring.Start_from >= '2011'
  AND shop.Name = 'FC Lahti'
  AND shop.Manager_name = 'Ilkka Mäkelä'
  AND shop.Location = 'Lahti'
  AND shop.District = 'Lahden Stadion'
  AND shop.Number_products = 15000

records.question: Who is George Chuter from Bristol working in shops in the Tehtaan kenttä district that have at least 3516 products?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
JOIN shop ON hiring.shop_id = shop.shop_id
WHERE shop.district = 'Tehtaan kenttä' AND shop.number_products >= 3516 AND employee.city = 'Bristol' AND employee.name = 'George Chuter'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.Employee_ID
FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.Employee_ID = hiring.Employee_ID
JOIN shop ON hiring.Shop_ID = shop.Shop_ID
WHERE employee.Name = 'George Chuter'
  AND employee.City = 'Bristol'
  AND shop.District = 'Tehtaan kenttä'
  AND shop.Number_products >= 3516

records.question: Which employees started working in 2003?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.employee_id FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.employee_id = hiring.employee_id
JOIN shop ON hiring.shop_id = shop.shop_id
WHERE hiring.start_from = '2003'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT employee.Employee_ID
FROM employee
JOIN hiring ON employee.Employee_ID = hiring.Employee_ID
WHERE substr(hiring.Start_from, 1, 4) = '2003'
